author: y4rr
content: Surfaced during Phase 6 #988 ASPP migration. Aspp branches now use Conv2d::new_full(dilation, groups=1, bias=false) directly — the 7-deep CPU loop is gone. Adding a DeepLabV3 value-parity fixture surfaces a deeper, structurally-different gap: torchvision's deeplabv3_resnet50 segmentation head is classifier.0.{convs.<i>.<j>, project.<i>}.* and classifier.{1,2,4}.* while ferrotorch produces head.aspp.{0,1,2,3,4}.<...>, head.aspp.project.<...>, head.classifier.<...>. The named_parameters layouts cannot align without a substantial naming-side rename or a state_remap function. Out-of-Phase-6 scope; this issue tracks it.
